3166600.name: Akpala - Tarnished Wings
3166600.description:
Introducing Single-Player Mode to Akpala, the VR Magic Battle Game with Voice Recognition!



"Tarnished Wings" is the first DLC for Akpala, bringing the much-expected single-player mode to the game!

In this scenario, you'll embark on an adventure as Castiel, a celestial guardian. While on a mission to protect someone dear to you, you suddenly face an incredibly difficult choice...

Enjoy the story while exploring new locations and battling powerful bosses. It's an action RPG you can play solo!



Will this game end happily? Or will it be a tragic conclusion? The truth is, no one knows yet.

The story changes based on your choices and how you fight. While the original tutorial allowed you to converse with AI characters, this new single-player mode introduces AI characters as enemies as well.

Can you outsmart these AI adversaries?



In single-player mode, you can acquire potions and weapons. Use your limited resources wisely to overcome challenges and unravel mysteries!



By purchasing this downloadable content, you'll gain full access to the single-player mode "Tarnished Wings".
3166600.supported_languages:
英语*, 日语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
